name: Moving Parts Weekly Commodity Market Update
description: A weekly discussion on what is driving the agricultural and food commodity markets. Corn, soybeans, veg oils, wheat, dairy and protein.

recent_episodes.title: February 24 Weekly Key Market Drivers
recent_episodes.description: SCOTUS rejects POTUS Trump’s tariffs! Today we’ll discuss the other options Trump is exploring to implement new tariffs. We’ll also talk about the crop estimates from last week’s USDA Outlook Forum, as well as our usual dairy and weather updates.

recent_episodes.title: February 17 Weekly Key Market Drivers
recent_episodes.description: Big week for managed money, who collectively decided it was time to buy the soy complex on a combination of higher energy prices, trade deals, positive China comments. We’ll talk potential upcoming biofuel announcements, our supply and demand balance sheets, and our usual dairy and weather updates.

recent_episodes.title: February 10 Weekly Key Market Drivers
recent_episodes.description: More trade deals! It looks like the main market movers for commodity markets this week have been the two new trade deals with Argentina and, more specifically, India. We’ll talk about the reaction from the soy complex, as well as give a preview of today’s February WASDE report.

notes: No real email found - Anchor placeholder
